name: vllm

mining_evidence.workflow_summary: Use $vllm-fusion-opportunity-miner on exported nsys sqlite, then rank Stage 2 opportunities from nsys_mining outputs.

parallel_notes: Use isolated worktrees and avoid overlapping benchmark windows on the same GPU when collecting promotion-grade evidence.
known_limitations: baseline_command and profile_command must be provided per deployment because vLLM launch flags vary by model/runtime configuration
E2E sweep expects {artifact_dir}/target.json to exist and be production-parity configured
This adapter does not infer correctness tolerances; define tolerances in validation artifacts before ship decisions
